modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Generate a repeating 32 ns compact ADC timing frame with these high windows: `rst` from 0.5 to 0.8 ns; `s` from 1.5 to 2.5 ns; `sar` from 3.0 to 5.4 ns; `clk_sar` from 3.0 to 3.25 ns, 3.6 to 3.85 ns, and 4.2 to 4.45 ns; `res` from 6.0 to 6.6 ns; `intg` from 8.0 to 8.7 ns; `zoom` from 9.2 to 10.8 ns; `clk_zoom` from 9.2 to 9.45 ns and 9.8 to 10.05 ns; and `rst_zoom` from 11.0 to 11.5 ns. All outputs should return low between their public windows and repeat every 32 ns.

title: ADC Zoom Timing Sequencer
